queries.q: I have recaps from the last eight sprint reviews; show me how the scope decision evolved over time

Pull together the board-prep view from every planning meeting this quarter
Where have stakeholder positions shifted across our last six roadmap reviews?
Surface any contradictions between what was decided in the March and May planning meetings
Give me the quarterly review of everything that's happened across this initiative's meetings
I need the narrative of how we got here, across all the recaps from this project
Consolidate the decisions from these twelve recap files into one chronological list
Track how the data team's position on this migration has changed across our last five syncs
Just summarize yesterday's single planning meeting for the people who were there
